nasb.text: and their brothers, valiant warriors, 128. And their overseer was Zabdiel, the son of Haggedolim.

esv.text: and their brothers, mighty men of valor, 128; their overseer was Zabdiel the son of Haggedolim.

cnv.text: 又有他們的親族，英勇的戰士共一百二十八人；哈基多琳的兒子撒巴第業是管理他們的官長。

ccb.text: 还有他们英勇的弟兄一百二十八人。他们的监督是哈基多琳的儿子撒巴第业。
